channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'This creates a layered form of obfuscation': New report says criminals are using emojis to avoid detection
item.description: Security analysts aren't scanning the dark web for emojis, allowing criminals to share messages wiithout being spotted.

item.title: How to watch the Triple-i Initiative showcase on April 9
item.description: The latest Triple-i Initiative Showcase is nearly upon us, as the indie-focused event returns for its third consecutive year on Thursday, April 9 at 12PM ET / 9AM PT. We’re being promised announcements for 40 games, including eight world premieres, so it’s well worth tuning in if you like your indies. You’ll be able to watch the stream on The Triple-i Initiative YouTube channel, as well as Twitch, bilibili, niconico and on Steam. Co-streaming partners IGN and Gamespot will also host their own streams. The showcase will run for 45 minutes, and nine featured studios will also have post-show dee...

item.title: Roku just added 6 more free streaming channels — and one of its most useful features is coming to more streaming services
item.description: New channels are rollin', rollin', rollin'… OUT NOW… to your Roku sticks and Roku TVs

item.title: Asus Zenbook A16 Review: Start Considering Snapdragon on PC, for Real
item.description: This thin and light 16-incher doesn't offer the same graphics capabilities as an Intel laptop, but it has great specs and performance for its price.

item.title: Anthropic’s New Product Aims to Handle the Hard Part of Building AI Agents
item.description: Amid rapid enterprise growth, Anthropic is trying to lower the barrier to entry for businesses to build AI agents with Claude.

item.title: 'If I can convince her to act, I will shamelessly do it': The Testaments creator on Elisabeth Moss' surprise return as June to The Handmaid's Tale spinoff
item.description: Elisabeth Moss returns as June in The Handmaid's Tale spinoff The Testaments episode 1 — and its creator knew the show 'always needed its Juneness'.

item.title: This new Steam feature could soon make buying games a lot easier — and it’ll be a great addition for the Steam Machine and custom PCs
item.description: The Steam Machine is now on the horizon, and clues in the Steam Client suggest a performance estimator could be coming as well.

item.title: Microsoft’s executive shake-up continues as developer division chief resigns
item.description: Microsoft is losing another veteran executive. Julia Liuson, head of Microsoft's developer division (DevDiv), is resigning from the software giant after 34 years. Liuson spent the past 12 years leading Microsoft's developer business, during a period Microsoft focused more on open source projects and acquired GitHub for $7.5 billion. Liuson will continue as head of […]...

item.title: Prices for the LG G6 and LG C6 OLED TVs have appeared on Amazon — and boy, have I got good news for you
item.description: The first prices for the LG G6 and LG C6 have appeared on Amazon — and if they're legit, it's very good news.

item.title: « Mettre la superintelligence entre toutes les mains » : Mark Zuckerberg annonce Muse Spark pour concurrencer GPT 5.4 Pro et Gemini 3.1
item.description: Alors que l'on pensait Meta coincé dans la course aux modèles de langage classiques, Mark Zuckerberg lance Muse Spark. Ce modèle "multimodal natif" promet une superintelligence personnelle capable de raisonner et d'agir à votre place. C'est le début d'une refonte totale de Meta AI pour contrer les géants OpenAI et Google.

item.title: Amazon Pulls Support for Perfectly Fine Older Kindles
item.description: In an email to customers, Amazon announced that it would be ending service for Kindle devices older than the 2012 edition. Those devices will lose access to the Kindle Store.

item.title: Channeling the 'timeless style of the franchise' Sony's next limited edition DualSense lets you embrace your inner Man with the Golden Gun and I simply must add it to my collection
item.description: Gooooold — Sony has revealed a fabulously shiny 007 First Light Limited Edition DualSense controller.

item.title: I've reviewed a bunch of golf watches, and can recommend these 8 to golfers looking to level up their game
item.description: As The Masters gets underway, it's the perfect time to invest in your own setup — these are the best golf watches I'd recommend right now.

item.title: Headphones are getting smarter — the latest open-ear buds from Suunto offer head movement controls and monitor your 'neck health'
item.description: The Suunto Spark open-ear buds could be the neck-st generation of performance tech.

item.title: Xiaomi TV Mini LED 75 pouces, iPhone 17 Pro Max et VTT électrique Decathlon : les 3 promos immanquables ce mercredi 8 avril 2026
item.description: Les bons plans de ce mercredi 8 avril 2026 réservent de très belles opportunités pour ceux qui souhaitent s’équiper sans se ruiner.

item.title: The New York Times Claims It Finally Unmasked Satoshi Nakamoto (This Time for Real)
item.description: If true, the man would be one of the richest people in the world on paper. He denies it.

item.title: Disney Might Be Rethinking Its Newest ‘Avatar’ Land
item.description: Plans for an 'Avatar'-themed space at the Disneyland Resort might be in danger after the release of 'Fire and Ash.'

item.title: These Amazon TV deals are almost too good to believe — save up to 53% on Samsung, LG, and TCL
item.description: Amazon has insanely cheap prices on its best-selling TVs right now, and I've rounded up the 12 best deals from Samsung, LG, TCL, and more.

item.title: These are the countries moving to ban social media for children
item.description: Australia was the first country to issue a ban in late 2025, aiming to reduce the pressures and risks that young users may face on social media, including cyberbullying, social media addiction, and exposure to predators.

item.title: Mysterious Seafood Virus May Be Behind Emerging Eye Disease, Scientists Warn
item.description: CMNV might be the first virus found in aquatic life linked to a specific eye disease in people.

item.title: I told you the Samsung Galaxy Z Trifold wasn't dead — it returns 'in limited quantities' to shelves on Friday
item.description: Contrary to reports, the Samsung Galaxy Z Trifold is not dead and is coming back to shelves this week.

item.title: PSG vs Liverpool Free Streams: How to watch Champions League 2025/26 quarter final
item.description: Here's how to watch PSG vs Liverpool in the first leg of their Champions League 2025-26 quarter-final

item.title: Meta's Muse Spark model brings reasoning capabilities to the Meta AI app
item.description: Following the icy reception to Llama 4, Meta is releasing the first in a new family of AI systems built by its recently formed Superintelligence team. The company is kicking off its new Muse era with Spark, a lightweight model geared toward consumer use. In the future, Meta plans to offer more capable versions of Muse, but for now, it's clear the company wants to nail the basics. To that point, many of Spark's capabilities are table stakes for a new model in 2026. For instance, it offers both "Instant" and "Thinking" modes. With the latter engaged, the model will take an extra few moments to r...

item.title: Fin du tarif unique chez Ionity : ce qui change pour la recharge de votre voiture électrique
item.description: Ionity a discrètement modifié la grille tarifaire de ses bornes de recharge pour voitures électriques en France, au Royaume-Uni et en Allemagne en ce mois d'avril 2026. Désormais, le prix au kWh varie selon que la borne est située sur autoroute ou ailleurs. Une logique commerciale compréhensible, certes, mais une absence de communication qui laisse ses clients et particulièrement les abonnés dans le flou. ...

item.title: EVs just had their best-ever month in the UK thanks to the fuel crisis — with one Chinese brand winning big
item.description: March was the best month ever for EV registrations in the UK — with Jaecoo and BYD breaking records.

item.title: Meta is reentering the AI race with a new model called Muse Spark
item.description: Meta Superintelligence Labs is launching its first model since Mark Zuckerberg spent billions overhauling the company's AI efforts. Called Muse Spark, the model now powers the Meta AI app and the Meta AI website in the US, per the company's announcement. In the coming weeks, Meta says, it will appear in WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, Messenger, […]

item.title: VistaPrint AI logo maker review: A simple AI design tool for small businesses
item.description: Let AI brand your business.

item.title: NordVPN’s desktop apps just got a new look — here’s all you need to know
item.description: NordVPN launches a streamlined desktop app designed for quicker connections, a cleaner interface, and faster search on Windows, Mac, and Linux.

item.title: The US Army will host commercial data centers on 'underutilized' land at four major bases
item.description: The US Army is planning to rent out land at four bases to support growing demand for data centers.

item.title: British cryptographer Adam Back denies NYT report that he is Bitcoin creator Satoshi Nakamoto
item.description: Back, a longtime researcher and pioneer in cryptography, denies the allegation that he is the secretive creator of Bitcoin.

item.title: Astropad’s Workbench reimagines remote desktop for AI agents, not IT support
item.description: Astropad’s Workbench lets users remotely monitor and control AI agents on Mac Minis from iPhone or iPad, with low-latency streaming and mobile access.

item.title: How to watch Barcelona vs Atletico Madrid: Free Streams for Champions League Quarter-Final 2025/26
item.description: Here's how to watch Barcelona vs Atletico Madrid in the first leg of their Champions League 2025-26 quarter-final

item.title: The Boys season 5 has already claimed its first victim — and it completes a redemption arc that began in the popular Prime Video show's first-ever episode
item.description: The Boys' heart-broken fans are grieving a major character's death in season 5's opening chapter.

item.title: Liquid Death and Pit Viper just released new sunglasses. But they’re for after you die
item.description: Now you can (maybe) look like a cool outfielder even in death. The most famous dead person to ever wear sunglasses just might be Bernie Lomax. Until now. Because the namesake for the 1989 hit comedy Weekend at Bernie’s was a fictional character, but you dear reader, you are very real.

item.title: L’armée française adapte un missile antichar pour abattre des drones en plein vol
item.description: L'armée française vient d'acquérir une première capacité opérationnelle face à la prolifération des attaques aériennes. Le ministère des Armées a confirmé le succès des premiers tirs d'un missile antichar pour abattre des drones ennemis en plein vol. Cette interception a été réalisée avec succès depuis un aéronef télépiloté MQ-9 Reaper.

item.title: Amazon’s Smart Thermostat can help lower your energy bills, and it’s down to $62
item.description: With temperatures on the rise and Earth Day right around the corner, now’s a good time to invest in a smart thermostat if you haven’t already. A good one like Amazon’s Smart Thermostat can help reduce energy use and lower your bills without sacrificing comfort, and right now it’s just $61.99 ($18 off) at Amazon. […]

item.title: Le Google Pixel 10 Pro noté 9/10 perd 400 € et s’accompagne de deux accessoires offerts, dont un chargeur de 67 W
item.description: Dans sa version 128 Go, le Google Pixel 10 Pro s'accompagne d'un chargeur secteur de 67 W et d'un pad sans fil dans un pack vendu pour 779 euros chez Boulanger, soit une remise de 35 % sur le prix d'origine du smartphone.

item.title: « Nous n’avons aucune chance » : le choc du patron de Honda dans une usine chinoise
item.description: La visite d'une usine à Shanghai a suffi à convaincre le patron de Honda que quelque chose n'allait plus. Face à une industrie automobile chinoise qui s'est transformée à une vitesse peu anticipée, le constructeur nippon remet à plat son organisation et tente de retrouver ce qui a longtemps fait sa réputation : ses ingénieurs.

item.title: New Maps Show Just How Much of the West Could Go Up in Flames This Summer
item.description: Amid drought and heat waves, April’s national wildfire forecast shows that nearly the entire Western U.S. will face an above-normal risk of wildfires at some point in the next four months.

item.title: Greece will ban all kids under 15 from using social media
item.description: Greece will ban children under the age 15 from using social media starting next year. Prime Minister Kyriakos Mitsotakis made the announcement in a video posted to TikTok, in which he referenced anxiety, sleep problems and addictive design features as reasons for the ban. Greece has been proactive in its approach to tackling excessive screen time for children, having already banned mobile phones in schools in 2024. While the PM chose not to name any platforms, he said he was concerned about children comparing themselves to others on social media and taking online comments to heart. "Greece wil...

item.title: How AI is quietly exhausting you—and what to do about it
item.description: The productivity paradox with this technology is surprising. I recently noticed a paradox among a team of developers. With AI, engineers started writing code faster and getting answers in seconds, yet they also reported feeling more exhausted than before.

item.title: Lego’s FIFA World Cup 2026 sets are up for preorder — yes, there’s a brick-built Lionel Messi
item.description: Lego has unveiled 8 new sets within the FIFA World Cup 26 Editions theme, and not only can you score a Lionel Messi Minifigure, but you can even build the soccer star out of bricks.

item.title: Comment passer d’Android à un iPhone ? Transférez vos comptes, photos, contacts et applications
item.description: Si passer d’un smartphone Android à un autre est relativement simple, passer à un iPhone signifie changer d’écosystème. Un passage un peu plus complexe, mais qui devient très simple. Suivez notre tutoriel pour passer d'Android à iPhone.

item.title: Meilleurs TV Hisense : quel modèle choisir en 2026 ?
item.description: Hisense fait partie du paysage TV en 2026, tout particulièrement sur des produits à coût avantageux face aux mastodontes LG et Samsung. On fait le point ici sur les modèles les plus intéressants à choisir dans le catalogue de la marque.

item.title: WhatsApp’s latest beta lets you set up a username, so you don’t have to share your phone number
item.description: WhatsApp's latest beta just took a major step forward on the privacy front, but only for select users.

item.title: Hackers steal and leak sensitive LAPD police documents
item.description: The LAPD said the breach affected “a digital storage system” belonging to the city’s Attorney's Office. The World Leaks extortion gang was reported to be behind the attack.

item.title: Waiting to buy the Galaxy S26? Now might be the moment — you can get $200 off at Samsung today
item.description: A record-low price on the brand-new Samsung flagships

item.title: 1,36 milliard d’euros de surcoûts, 200 000 tonnes de CO2… La fin de la 2G et de la 3G suscite la controverse
item.description: Dans une tribune, un collectif d’associations lance l’alerte : la fin des réseaux 2G et 3G aura un impact majeur sur les personnes précarisées. À l’heure actuelle, l'État n’a pas prévu d’aides ou de compensations. Par ailleurs, l’impact écologique serait important.

item.title: Home Depot revives its Halfway to Halloween sale: Shop the spooky drop before it sells out
item.description: The Home Depot has revived its annual Halfway to Halloween sale. The retailer surprise-released a selection of its popular Halloween decorations on April 8.

item.title: Steam Link débarque sur l’Apple Vision Pro, avec une limitation
item.description: Si vous rêvez de lancer vos jeux Steam sur le casque Vision Pro d'Apple, votre souhait est exaucé. Steam Link est disponible nativement en bêta, mais il y a un mais.

item.title: These top-rated Soundcore headphones just dropped to a near-record low at Amazon
item.description: As of April 8, you can get the Soundcore by Anker Q20i for $39.99 at Amazon, down from $69.99. That's a 43% discount or a $30 price cut.

item.title: The Biggest Apple Copycat Is Now Copying Ray-Ban Meta AI Glasses
item.description: There may be no way to escape camera-equipped glasses.

item.title: OpenAI releases a new safety blueprint to address the rise in child sexual exploitation
item.description: OpenAI's new Child Safety Blueprint aims to tackle the alarming rise in child sexual exploitation linked to advancements in AI.

item.title: Travelers on Southwest face a new rule as airlines try to reduce the fire risk on flights
item.description: A new limit on portable chargers begins on April 20. Travelers will soon face restrictions on how many portable chargers they can carry on a flight as airlines continue to try to reduce the risk of another lithium battery fire aboard their jets.Southwest Airlines announced Tuesday that starting April 20, passengers will only be able to carry one charger on their planes, and they won’t be allowed to put it in the overhead bin or in their checked luggage. The airline already requires passengers to keep their chargers in the open while they are using them, so flight attendants can act quickly if ...

item.title: Developer of VeraCrypt encryption software says Windows users may face boot-up issues after Microsoft locked his account
item.description: The maker of the popular open source file encryption software VeraCrypt said Microsoft locked his online account, which may prevent device owners from booting up their computers.

item.title: What Is Going On With the Artemis 2 Toilet?
item.description: The toilet inside Orion has been malfunctioning since launch day. NASA still doesn’t know why.

item.title: The Nintendo Switch 2 version of 007 First Light is delayed until later this summer
item.description: Nintendo Switch 2 owners will have to wait a bit longer to check out IO Interactive's stab at a James Bond game on the console. The Hitman developer has delayed that version of 007 First Light until later this summer. The game is still slated to hit PS5, Xbox Series X/S and PC on May 27, which itself is a delay from the previous March release date. "We're excited to see players discovering James Bond's reimagined origin story," IOI wrote on X. "[We] are looking forward to bringing you the best game experience possible across all platforms."Earlier this year, IOI suggested that PC players would...

item.title: Comment réinitialiser l’Amazon Fire TV quand plus rien ne marche : plus de télécommande, plus de Wi-Fi
item.description: On a parfois l'impression que nos appareils tech se liguent contre nous pour nous rendre la vie difficile. Ce fut mon cas en essayant de réinitialiser une Amazon Fire TV. J'ai fini par réussir grâce à un iPhone et un smartphone sous Android.

item.title: Claim a free Anker fast-charging block with Soundcore Sleep A30 earbuds — heres how
item.description: Amazon is giving away Anker Nano USB-C charger blocks for free when you buy the SoundCore Sleep A30 earbuds. Here's how to claim.

item.title: Top open source AI platform Flowise hit by maximum-level security issue
item.description: A 10/10 Flowise bug was patched, but is now being abused in the wild.

item.title: A new Google Pixel update has landed — complete with a fix for an annoying game-crashing bug
item.description: The April 2026 Google Pixel update is rolling out now, with fixes for various crashes and missing interface elements.
